pr.title: Non-record: TernaryRecurrentGPT - ternary 1.58-bit MLP + depth recurrence (1xL4 val_bpb=1.5348)

output.summary: Loops over 7 unique layers for 14-depth recurrence and 1.58-bit ternary MLPs with Muon/AdamW+SWA to shrink the quant gap.
techniques: 1.58-bit STE QAT ternary MLPs enabled late in training
Depth recurrence via two loops over 7 unique layers for extra depth
Muon matrix optimizer with AdamW scalars and SWA from 40%
